title: Argyroxiphium × kai
taxonomy: Argyroxiphium × kai is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is believed to be a naturally occurring cross between Argyroxiphium sandwicense and Argyroxiphium kaense. This rare and endangered plant is endemic to Hawaii and is known for its showy yellow flowers. The classification of Argyroxiphium × kai is still being studied, but it is often considered a nothospecies, a hybrid species that has been recognized as a distinct taxon. Further research is needed to confirm its classification and understand its evolutionary history.
